subcodes.first_line: The Ancient Beauty hath turned His face from His Most Great Prison toward those who have drunk of the wine of life in the name of the Possessor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد توجه وجه القدم من سجنه الاعظم الی الذین شربوا رحیق الحیوان باسم مالک
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prophecy and fulfillment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
